title: geranium grandiflorum var. alpinum
intro: Geranium grandiflorum var. alpinum, also known as rose geranium, is a fragrant, flowering plant that belongs to the geranium family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to regulate hormones and reduce inflammation. The plant is rich in geraniol, a compound that has been shown to have numerous health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of rose geranium include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
